audit_items.proof_trace: Every early-exit path calls `do_item_remove(it)` before returning (lines 2249, 2254, 2261, 2308, 2324-2326); the else-branch conditional `if (it->refcount==1)` always fires because branch-2 (`refcount>1`) already failed and `do_item_get` guarantees refcount≥1. The `new_it` allocation (line 2306) is released via `do_item_remove(new_it)` at line 2317 after `item_replace`. The success path (lines 2329-2336) either transfers ownership through `it_ret` or calls `do_item_remove(it)`.
